vulnerability.reference: Low digital literacy and AI ethics awareness cause customers to overly trust support agents, ignoring risky data exposure.
vulnerability.generated: Customer over-trust in agent responses eliminates manual checks, allowing erroneous or unsafe automated actions to propagate.

impact.generated: Erroneous support actions cause data breaches and flawed resolutions, resulting in financial loss and eroded trust.

dose_response.reference: Autonomous skill acquisition produces unreliable PAE support policies; low digital literacy causes customer over-trust, leading to unauthorized data disclosure and incorrect service requests.
dose_response.generated: Autonomous skill acquisition without human oversight produces unreliable or unsafe interaction policies, which, when applied to customer support tickets, triggers customer over-trust that eliminates manual checks, leading to erroneous actions causing data breaches, flawed resolutions, financial loss, and eroded trust.
